_comment: Internal artifact manifest. Renders in /admin → Materials tab. To add a repo-tracked entry: drop the file in the repo, add a row here, commit + push. (Browser uploads via the admin UI go through /api/admin-materials and live in Supabase.)

items.title: Roadmap — 1-week / 30-day / quarter punchlist

items.title: Security Audit — v1 + v2

items.title: Visual / UX Audit — v1 + v2
items.description: Nielsen heuristics + premium SaaS comparison. Tier A/B/C action plan.

items.title: Mobile Audit
items.description: iPhone 12 / 390×844 viewport pass across all customer pages. Critical /comparison fix shipped.

items.title: Marketing Pack — Master index (start here)
items.description: Navigation entry point. Lists all 18 files in the pack with one-line summaries + suggested reading order.

items.title: Agent Library — Live Slack demos (4 scenarios)
items.description: Public page at /agent-library showing Ramped Bot working in 4 real Slack workflows — Ops, Sales, Finance, Customer Support. Each scenario has anchor link + persona context + outcome stats. Embed in LinkedIn posts, sales emails, or screen-record for video ads.

items.title: Launch Content Roadmap — full production plan
items.description: Tier A/B/C breakdown of every asset Ramped needs for launch + first 60 days. Per-item: tool used, status, dependencies. Channel-by-channel content cadence.

items.title: Marketing Pack — README (overview)
items.description: Tour of the pack: which file for which channel, the 5 voice rules, when to update.

items.title: Brand Style Guide — voice + visual rules
items.description: 5 voice rules, words to never use, words that ARE us, color/type tokens, CTA rules. Read first before writing for Ramped.

items.title: Founder Narrative — Andrew Yoon's origin story
items.description: 4 lengths of the same story: 30s, 60s, 5min, blog post outline. Plus press soundbites.

items.title: Positioning Matrix — vs Viktor / Lindy / Gumloop / Zapier AI / UiPath
items.description: Profiles of every direct competitor + substrate threats. Pricing comparison. Differentiation talking points.

items.title: LinkedIn Posts — 12 founder-voice drafts
items.description: 12 drafts across founder origin, contrarian takes, demos, customer stories. 4-week rotation schedule.

items.title: Twitter / X — 25 tweets across 5 themes
items.description: Hot takes · numbers · threads · demos · brand. Founder + company-account split.

items.title: Instagram Captions — static · carousel · reels · stories
items.description: Format-specific captions + sample 30-day content schedule.

items.title: Cold Email Outbound — 4 sequences × 4 emails (16 total)
items.description: Sequence A (ops pain), B (VA replacement), C (AI fatigue), D (post-funding). Reply handling.

items.title: Onboarding Emails — 7-email drip for /book prospects
items.description: Confirmation → prep → post-call follow-up → story → benchmark → re-engage → break-up.

items.title: Ad Copy Library — LinkedIn / Twitter / Meta / Google / Display
items.description: Headline + body variants per channel. A/B test protocol, channel budget mix, performance targets.

items.title: Objection Responses — 15 sales objections + replies
items.description: Pricing · skepticism · competitive · process · alignment. Empathy-first reframes.

items.title: Case Study Template — reusable customer story format
items.description: 8-section template + visual elements + pre-publish checklist + library plan.

items.title: Landing Page Copy — homepage A/B variants
items.description: Variants for hero h1, subhead, CTA, numbers section. 12-week test roadmap.

items.title: Content Calendar — 12-week rolling schedule
items.description: Weekly cadence per channel · 12-week themes · production pipeline · metrics + targets.

items.title: Press Release — newswire-format launch
items.description: Standard release + short version + tweet version + LinkedIn version. Distribution checklist.

items.title: Video Strategy — what we learned + path forward
items.description: Three video strategies (pure AI, real product, hybrid). Higgsfield + ElevenLabs setup. Asset roadmap.

items.title: Marketing Visuals Pack — 6 ad creatives (open in browser)
items.description: Pixel-perfect HTML mockups: LinkedIn 1200×627 · IG 1080×1080 · Twitter 1600×900 · Display 300×600 · Email signature 600×200 · Logo lockup sheet.

items.title: Claude Design Log — generated visual assets
items.description: Log of every Claude Design generation: 3 ads rendered, prompts saved, queued next assets.

items.description: Log of video generations + lessons learned. Credit usage tracking.
